## Safety checklist

- [ ] Keeps read-only mode safe by default
- [ ] Does not add a local LLM dependency
- [ ] Does not download model weights
- [ ] Does not include secrets in context packs
- [ ] Does not add arbitrary shell execution
- [ ] Adds or updates tests when behavior changes

## Test notes

Commands run:

```text
pytest
```
